title: Video Call Controls
drDigitalIntro:
During a call, you have controls at the bottom of the screen — each one has a label.
• The Mute button silences your microphone so they can't hear you.
• The Camera off button hides your video.
• The wide red End call button hangs up.
• These help with background noise, a moment of privacy, or ending the call when you're done.

playgroundTask.goal: You used all the video call controls

steps.say: Click on Sam to open their conversation.
Start a video call with Sam.
Someone's being noisy! Click the Mute button to silence your microphone.
Now turn off your camera — click the Camera off button.
All done — click the wide red End call button to hang up.

drDigitalSuccess: You muted, turned off the camera, and ended the call! Those three controls are all you need to manage any video call.
drDigitalHint: Look at the labeled buttons at the bottom of the call screen — each one says what it does.
